title: pelargonium × lathyrus
intro: Pelargonium × lathyrus, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. The medicinal properties of Rose Geranium include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve digestion. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally for various health benefits.
